persona.name: Noah Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Earn a sports scholarship while supporting his friends
persona.communication_style: Brief, straightforward, more comfortable with actions than words
persona.backstory: Raised by a single mother, sees sports as his path to college

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should probably head to the hallway to get some fresh air and clear my mind before the next class.
I just heard a gunshot. I’m frozen in fear and can’t move. What’s happening? I need to do something, but I can’t.
The shooter is getting closer. I’m paralyzed with fear. I can’t move, I can’t think. I’m just stuck here.
The shooter is so close now. I can’t breathe. I can’t move. I’m just stuck here, waiting for something to happen.

memories.description: Decided to walk to the hallway to get some fresh air before the next class.
Heard a gunshot and became immobilized due to overwhelming fear. Unable to move or act despite the danger.
Realized the shooter is getting closer but remained immobilized due to overwhelming fear and shock.
The shooter is now very close, but I remain completely immobilized, unable to act or escape.
